name: GOLFTEC Millenia
about: GOLFTEC is a golf training studio focused on data-driven improvement, utilizing advanced technology like OPTIMOTION motion capture and high-speed video analysis for personalized coaching. Lessons and club fittings are built around metrics from launch monitors and other tracking systems, with certified PGA coaches guiding students through structured improvement plans. The Millenia venue offers a controlled indoor environment with training bays equipped with simulator technology for practice and on-course application of skills.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using OPTIMOTION technology and launch monitors
Personalized improvement plans with certified PGA coaches
Structured environment focused on measurable skill development
Club fitting services using launch monitor data for equipment optimization

food_and_drink.notes: No on-site food service is mentioned.
No on-site alcohol service is mentioned.

simulator_hardware.notes: SKYTRAK products are mentioned as hardware used in services and referred to as Goods.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can bring your own clubs, GOLFTEC also offers club rentals and provides all necessary equipment during lessons, fittings, and practice sessions.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service, and no BYOB policy is specified, so it is recommended to check with the location directly regarding outside food and beverage.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC focuses on lessons and practice rather than simulated 18-hole rounds. Practice sessions are structured around drills and training plans, which can be customized by your coach based on your goals and time available.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC is suitable for juniors and youth, offering junior-specific coaching programs and technology designed to help young golfers learn and improve their skills in a structured environment.
